seo.title: Musliman Academy | Online Quran, Arabic & Tajweed Classes
seo.description: Musliman Academy offers online Quran, Arabic, Tajweed, Islamic Studies, and teacher training classes for non-Arabic speakers with qualified Egyptian teachers.

about.heading: Every Learner Has a Way
about.lead: At Musliman Academy, we make learning simple, clear, and achievable through the right method, patient guidance, and step-by-step support for every student who wants to learn Quran online.
about.paragraph1: At Musliman Academy, we believe that every learner has a way. Every student learns differently, so we provide simple, patient, and step-by-step online Quran classes and Arabic classes for beginners designed around each learner's level and needs.
about.paragraph2: The Academy offers Quran reading for children, Online Tajweed classes, Arabic, Islamic Studies for children, Quran Memorization, Quran Tafseer, Tarteel Qaidah, and teacher training for Quran teachers through qualified Egyptian Quran teachers with Al-Azhar educational background.

programs.heading: Choose the Right Learning Path
programs.description: Programs designed for every level, age, and goal, including Online Quran classes, Online Tajweed classes, Arabic classes for beginners, and Islamic Studies for children.

quranReading.title: Quran Reading
quranReading.text: Learn Quran online and read the Quran correctly with step-by-step guidance, clear pronunciation, and continuous correction.

tarteelQaidah.title: Tarteel Qaidah
tarteelQaidah.text: Start from Arabic letters and sounds, then progress to reading Quranic words, verses, and reciting with confidence.

quranMemorization.title: Quran Memorization
quranMemorization.text: A structured memorization program with revision, correction, and regular follow-up to help students memorize effectively.

tajweed.title: Tajweed
tajweed.text: Improve your Quran recitation by learning Tajweed rules in a simple, practical, and easy-to-apply way.

quranTafseer.title: Quran Tafseer
quranTafseer.text: Understand the meanings of Quranic verses through simplified explanations suitable for the student's age and level.

arabicLanguage.title: Arabic Language
arabicLanguage.text: Arabic classes for beginners covering letters, pronunciation, reading, writing, and simple understanding to build a strong language foundation.

islamicStudies.title: Islamic Studies
islamicStudies.text: Islamic Studies for children and adults covering belief, worship, Seerah, manners, and morals in a clear and simple way.

islamicValues.title: Islamic Values for Children
islamicValues.text: Help children build good Islamic character through practical values such as honesty, respect, mercy, cooperation, and love for learning.

pricing.heading: Schedule & Fee
pricing.subtitle: Each class is 30 minutes. Monthly plans are calculated based on 4 total learning hours per month.
pricing.note: All prices are starting prices and may vary depending on the selected program, class type, and learning plan.
pricing.ctaText: Flexible plans designed for different learning goals.

audience.reassuranceStrong: We're here to help you learn, grow, and stay connected to the Quran and your faith.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our online Islamic and Arabic classes.
faq.cardText: We're here to help you on your learning journey.

q1.question: Are the classes online?
q1.answer: Yes, all our classes are 100% online. You can learn from the comfort of your home, at a time that suits you, from anywhere in the world.

q2.question: Do you teach complete beginners?
q2.answer: Yes, we teach complete beginners step by step, starting from the basics until they build confidence.

q3.question: Do you teach children and adults?
q3.answer: Yes, we teach children, adults, beginners, and advanced learners.

q4.question: Is there a free trial class?
q4.answer: Yes, you can book a free trial class before starting your learning plan.

q5.question: Can parents follow their child's progress?
q5.answer: Yes, parents receive regular follow-up and progress updates.

q6.question: Do you offer one-to-one classes?
q6.answer: Yes, we offer one-to-one classes and small group classes depending on the learner's needs.

q7.question: How do I start Quran lessons with Musliman Academy?
q7.answer: You can start by booking a free trial class. After you submit your details, our team will contact you to understand your level, goals, and preferred schedule. Then we help you choose a suitable teacher and learning plan.

q8.question: Are there female Quran teachers at Musliman Academy?
q8.answer: Yes, Musliman Academy has qualified female Quran teachers for sisters and young girls. Our teachers provide patient guidance in Quran reading, Tajweed, memorization, and Islamic learning in a supportive online environment.

q9.question: How flexible are the Quran class timings?
q9.answer: Our Quran class timings are flexible and designed to suit students in different countries and time zones. Whether you are a parent, student, or working professional, we help you choose a suitable time for your lessons.

q10.question: How can I learn the Quran online?
q10.answer: You can learn the Quran online through live one-to-one or small group sessions with qualified teachers. Musliman Academy offers step-by-step Quran reading, Tajweed, memorization, and correction lessons for beginners and advanced learners.

footer.aboutText: Musliman Academy is a trusted online platform helping non-Arabic speakers learn the Quran, Arabic, and Islamic values with qualified Egyptian teachers in a supportive environment.
